eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Pueblo; Custer, CO; at 6:17 PM on JUN 29, 2026 Effective until 6:17 PM JUN 30, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Pueblo County Alert: This is the Pueblo County Sheriff's Office with a reminder that the entire community of Beulah is under mandatory evacuation for a wildland fire until further notice. The only safe way out is to go over North Creek. There is a shelter at 1650 Cooper Place in Pueblo County. If you need assistance evacuating call 911.
